title: Bike Lanes vs Business Access
description: A corridor redesign would replace curb parking with protected bike lanes.

participants.name: Iris
participants.statement: Protected bike lanes will make the street safer and reduce car dependency.

participants.name: Dev
participants.statement: Removing curb parking will hurt shops because customers need quick access.

participants.name: Cam
participants.statement: Traffic violence is a safety issue, and bike lanes are a proven solution.

participants.name: Lena
participants.statement: I support safer streets, but accessible drop-off zones must remain nearby.

participants.name: Ravi
participants.statement: The city should publish data about loading demand before construction.

participants.name: Tess
participants.statement: Business owners feel ignored when street changes are announced late.
